mapper.select: SELECT si.inventory_id, si.schedule_id, si.seat_id, si.status AS inv_status, si.hold_type, si.held_by, si.held_until, si.version, s.section, s.seat_row, s.seat_number, s.grade, s.price FROM seat_inventory si JOIN seat s ON si.seat_id = s.seat_id WHERE si.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY s.section, s.seat_row, s.seat_number
mapper.update: UPDATE seat_inventory SET status='HELD', held_by=#{memberId}, held_until=#{holdUntil}, version=version+1 WHERE schedule_id=#{scheduleId} AND seat_id=#{seatId} AND status='AVAILABLE'
UPDATE seat_inventory SET status='AVAILABLE', held_by=NULL, held_until=NULL, version=version+1 WHERE schedule_id=#{scheduleId} AND seat_id=#{seatId} AND held_by=#{memberId} AND status='HELD'
UPDATE seat_inventory SET status='AVAILABLE', held_by=NULL, held_until=NULL, version=version+1 WHERE status='HELD' AND held_until < NOW()
UPDATE seat_inventory SET status='AVAILABLE', held_by=NULL, held_until=NULL, version=version+1 WHERE schedule_id=#{scheduleId} AND status='RESERVED' AND seat_id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_inventory WHERE schedule_id=#{scheduleId} AND status='AVAILABLE' AND hold_type='PUBLIC'

SELECT si.inventory_id, si.schedule_id, si.seat_id, si.status AS inv_status, si.hold_type, si.held_by, si.held_until, si.version, s.section, s.seat_row, s.seat_number, s.grade, s.price FROM seat_inventory si JOIN seat s ON si.seat_id = s.seat_id WHERE si.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND si.seat_id = #{seatId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_inventory WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND status = 'RESERVED'

SELECT si.inventory_id, si.schedule_id, si.seat_id, si.status AS inv_status, si.held_by, si.held_until, si.version, s.section, s.seat_row, s.seat_number, s.grade, s.price FROM seat_inventory si JOIN seat s ON si.seat_id = s.seat_id WHERE si.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND si.seat_id IN
#{id}
